title: Getting issue in downloading excel on IOS mobile
author: umesh447766
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/discussions/2833
Originally posted by **umesh447766** October 11, 2024 Hi Team, I am using exceljs in my react application to export some data into excel file. In windows, android based devices this download functionality is working fine. But when it comes to IOS mobile the download is not working. can someone explain how to fix this in IOS mobile apps
